summary: Fase 5 stock.quant sync testing completed. All backend APIs (100%) and frontend pages (100%) working correctly. Stock quants sync includes 1,042,549 records from Odoo via GLOBAL company_scope.
passed_tests: GET /api/stock-quants - returns 1,042,549 paginated quants with product_id/location_id filters
GET /api/stock-by-product - returns 8,046 products from v_stock_by_product with only_available toggle
GET /api/stock-by-location - returns 16,811 rows with location_name (x_nombre) from stock_location join
GET /api/health - includes stock_quant table with 1,042,549 count and max_write_date
GET /api/sync-jobs - STOCK_QUANTS job exists with chunk_size=5000, company_scope=GLOBAL
/stock-quants page: displays quant table with odoo_id, product_id, location_id, qty, reserved_qty, in_date, write_date columns
/stock-quants page: product_id and location_id filter inputs work
/stock-by-product page: displays products with available_qty badges (green/red)
/stock-by-product page: 'Solo disponible' toggle filters only available_qty > 0
/stock-by-location page: displays Tienda column with location name (e.g., 'AP')
/stock-by-location page: location_id filter and 'Solo disponible' toggle work
Navigation: all 3 stock pages accessible via nav bar (Stock Quants, Stock x Producto, Stock x Tienda)
seed_data_creation: None - using real synced data (1,042,549 stock quants from Odoo)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock quant sync is complete. Database has 1,042,549 stock.quant records (company_key='GLOBAL'). Views v_stock_by_product (8,046 rows) and v_stock_by_product_location (16,811 rows) are populated. All 3 API endpoints and UI pages working. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_stock_quants.py
